intro: You spot something sparkling in the grass.$It almost looks like a badge, or a more ornate Shiny Charm...$Whatever it is, it would look lovely pinned on your favorite Pokémon!
title: Shiny Badge
description: A delicate badge glitters where the light catches it. There is only one, and both of you can tell it is special.

1.label: I must have it!
1.tooltip:
(+) Shiny Badge
(?) May start a duel

2.label: It's okay, you can have it
2.tooltip: (?) Let your friend take the badge
2.selected: You step back from the badge.

duel.start: Both of you reach for it at once.$For a moment, neither of you lets go...

outro.awarded: The badge gleams as it is pinned in place.$Glancing at your friend though, you can't help but wonder if it was worth it.
outro.tiebreak: After a very polite argument, the badge finally finds a home.
outro.duel: The battle settles the matter, and the badge gleams in the winner's hand.
outro.heal: You bring your friend to the Pokémon Center and get their Pokémon checked up.
